attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 , CASE WHEN INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999  WHEN INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888   ELSE INV.SALES_ORDER_KEY END SALES_ORDER_KEY
 ,  CASE WHEN INV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999  WHEN INV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888   ELSE INV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,  CASE WHEN INV.PRODUCT_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999  WHEN INV.PRODUCT_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -998  WHEN INV.PRODUCT_KEY BETWEEN -1011800 AND -1010000 THEN -997  ELSE INV.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY
 ,  CASE WHEN INV.AR_TRX_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999  WHEN INV.AR_TRX_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888   ELSE INV.AR_TRX_KEY END AR_TRX_KEY
 ,  CASE WHEN INV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999  WHEN INV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888   ELSE INV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,  CASE WHEN INV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE INV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END END_CUSTOMER_KEY
 ,  CASE WHEN INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 ,  CASE WHEN INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 ,  CASE WHEN INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 ,  CASE WHEN INV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE INV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,   INV.SALES_REP_NUMBER
 , INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
 , INV.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
 ,   INV.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD
 , INV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
 , INV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
 , INV.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD
 ,   INV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
 , INV.AR_TRX_DATETIME
 , INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
 , INV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
 ,   INV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG
 , INV.DV_CHARGES_FLG
 , INV.DV_MISC_FLG
 , INV.DV_SERVICE_FLG
 , INV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG
 ,   INV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG
 , INV.DV_REVENUE_FLG
 , INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
 , INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT
 ,   INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT
 , INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT
 , INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT
 , INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
 ,   INV.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT
 , INV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT
 , INV.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
 , INV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY
 ,   INV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY
 , INV.GL_DT
 , ADJ_TYPE.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID
 ,  ADJ_TYPE.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID
 , INV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
 ,   INV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
 , INV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
 , INV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
 , INV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD
 ,   INV.GL_POSTED_DTM
 , INV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY
 , INV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
 , INV.BK_SS_CD
 , ADJ_TYPE.L3_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID
 ,   FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
 ,   /*RP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
 , */  NULL AS RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
 ,  FISCAL.RUN_BATCH_ID
 ,  INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT
 ,  INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT
 ,  INV.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT
 ,  INV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
 ,  INV.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 ,  INV.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG 
 ,  CASE WHEN INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY  END REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, /*Performance changes, as part of APR-FY17 CDR*/       
  /*New OA Columns*/  INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 ,  INV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
 ,  INV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
 ,  INV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 ,  INV.DV_FMV_FLG 
 ,  FISCAL2.CALENDAR_YEAR_INT*100+FISCAL2.CALENDAR_MONTH_NUMBER_INT     CALENDAR_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT  
 ,INV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  /*Added as part of Q3FY15 ICPM ICMS LTF */  
 ,INV.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT  /*Added as part of Q3FY15 ICPM ICMS LTF */  
 ,INV.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/  
 , INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,                  /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */  
  CASE WHEN INV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE INV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY  END XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY , 
 /* Performance changes, as part of APR- FY17 CDR */  
 /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */ 
INV.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME    /* pneelraj : Added as part of Q1FY16 ICPM */ 
 ,INV.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID		/*bbalivad : Added as part of Q1FY17 SOT OA*/
 /*ADDED THE BELOW 4 COLUMNS AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 ,INV.XCAT_FLG
 ,INV.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 ,INV.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
 ,INV.ELA_FLG
,INV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY  /* Column added as part of Q4FY17 CSPP VIP Proj*/
,INV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT     /*Column added as part of Q1FY18 SOT XAAS*/
,INV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD  /* PPUSA: Column added as part of Q1FY18 RO*/
,INV.POB_TYPE_CD
,INV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,INV.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG
/*Column added as part of FY19 ACRL CHANGES*/
,CASE WHEN INV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE INV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY END ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
,CASE WHEN INV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE INV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY END MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
,INV.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */
,INV.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,INV.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
,INV.NET_PRICE_FLG
,INV.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,INV.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,INV.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,INV.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,INV.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 FROM   /*$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE INV */ 
 $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_INV_REV_MEASURE INV   
 /* kinutakk:below join table and join condition is removed as part of performance OPtimization 
 ,and population null as Ru_BK_product_FAMILY_ID  which we  are getting from   STGDB.WI_R_PRODUCTS_REV_AGGR : 
     we are adding this join condition at child level itself  to get the required column where it is required  */  
  /* INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_R_PRODUCTS_REV_AGGR  RP    ON (INV.PRODUCT_KEY=RP.ITEM_KEY)*/   
  INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_GL_CHANNEL_MSR_MONTH_CNTL FISCAL    
  ON (FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT   
  AND FISCAL.INC_FLAG='Y')  /* NEW CONDITION INC_FLAG='Y' IS ADDED TO PROCESS INCREMENTAL DATA ONLY */   
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DIRECT_INDIRECT_ADJ_TYPE ADJ_TYPE   
  ON (INV.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = ADJ_TYPE.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD   
  AND INV.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD = ADJ_TYPE.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD   
  AND INV.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = ADJ_TYPE.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD)     
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FISCAL2  
  ON INV.GL_DT= FISCAL2.CALENDAR_DATE  
  WHERE     INV.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG ='N'  
  /*Added as Part of ICPM RTM Q3FY16*/
/*AND INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ('AR','AR-OOD','AR-1C')*/

/* BELOW FILTER ADDED BY PERF TEAM */
AND    INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  IN 
 ( SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_CHANNEL_MSR_MONTH_CNTL FISCAL 
WHERE FISCAL.INC_FLAG = 'Y' )
